completion_summary: Extended the WF-00.6 fixed 15-task maturity report with WF-00.4 execution-role auditing. Each task now records actual_provider_roles, declared_provider_roles, actual_role_partition, and the global provider role catalog for runtime, runtime_fallback, diagnostic, and reference providers. Reference-only providers are rejected from actual runtime partitions while diagnostic providers remain explicitly classified. Updated report hash: 13c8b11895c334365590a267d5a165f683bb33d59cb216e8b6e6b0ce36d4b097. Validated by 785 passed/11 skipped full suite, 16 targeted maturity/reachability tests, audit_maturity_report task_count=15 with role_boundary_passed=true, Ruff, mypy, and claim check. No task contract, World Law, runtime route, observation/scoring, golden, benchmark, or WF-30 path changes. Implementation commit 51a06f8b4112aa3fe6e529e003fcb8d4028f0eb3; integrated main 51a06f8b4112aa3fe6e529e003fcb8d4028f0eb3.
notes: Extends the completed WF-00.6 audit only. No task contract, World Law, observation/scoring, runtime registry/dispatch, golden trajectory, benchmark threshold, or WF-30 drying path changes.
scope: WF-00.4 role-aware maturity audit distinguishing runtime, runtime-fallback, diagnostic, and reference providers and proving reference/runtime route separation in the fixed 15-task report
